title: Service Discovery with DNS and Consul
scenario: Design a service discovery system using DNS and Consul. The system should register services and provide a mechanism for service lookup. The target LLM output should be a high-level architecture diagram in Markdown format.
constraints: Must use Consul for service registration and discovery
Must use DNS for service lookup

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated architecture diagram should accurately represent the service discovery system.
The architecture should include Consul integration for service registration and discovery.
The architecture should include DNS integration for service lookup.
